track: Tattile: ”Tattile” is pure bliss. Oscar Rocchi and Giancarlo Barigozzi has been a huge inspiration working on my Natura Morta album.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Sixth Dimension: Pulsating track with a strong groove and interesting layers.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Prairies:  Exciting wildlife track with psychedelic rhythms and adventurous arrangements.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Clessidra : Another incredible Sorgini track (and album too) with stunning artwork.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Dance Music: This fantastic track from Mukti is a Bollywood beauty that needs no further introduction.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Pageing Sullivan: Strong rhythmic jazz waltz by Basil Kirchin & company.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Metropoli: Another beautiful jazzwaltz in 6/8 credited to Nuan alias Antonello Vannucchi.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Valle Celeste: Stunning ballad with haunting vocals by Edda dell’Orso.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: To Jean: Beautiful lounge pop with fantastic arrangements by Pisano and haunting vocals by Edda dell’Orso.
title: AD Mixtape · Natura Morta (A Sven Wunder Mixtape)

track: Foggy Town: Beautiful dreamy guitar-led track by Alessandroni. His work has been a strong influence working on Natura Morta as well.
